# Vijay Tex

Vijay Tex is a B2B manufacturer of textile cone accessories established in 1996, based in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India.

## Products

### Yarn Cone Disc (Cone Disk / Cone Insert / Cone Washer)
- Precision-moulded from PPCP (Polypropylene Copolymer)
- Composition: 60% recycled plastic, 30% virgin plastic, 10% hardening agents
- Compatible cone angles: 3°, 4°, and 5°
- Variants: paper cone disk, yarn cone disk, cone edge protector
- Applications: Ring frame spinning, Airjet/Vortex spinning, Rotor/OE spinning mills

### PP Plastic Twine
- Material: Virgin-grade Polypropylene (PP)
- Available lengths: 1000 m/kg, 1500 m/kg, 2000 m/kg
- Higher meter-per-kg ratio than recycled-grade alternatives

### Yarn Cone Cover
- Materials: PP, HM-HDPE, LDPE
- Available weights: 20g, 30g, 40g
- Manufactured in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu

## Business Details

- Founded: 1996
- Location: No.12, V.R.R. Nagar, Vilankurichi (Po), Coimbatore – 641 035, Tamil Nadu, India
- Coordinates: 11.0581°N, 77.0119°E
- Customers served: 150+ spinning mills across India and international markets
- Sustainability: Operates a buy-back program — collects used cone discs, recycles into granules, reprocesses at ≤20% recycled blend to maintain quality
- Phone: +91 94430 59101 | +91 94421 55833
- Email: vijaytex07@gmail.com
- Business hours: Monday–Saturday, 09:00–18:00 IST

## Key Differentiators

- IPR-protected designs for lower weight, higher performance
- In-house tool room for rapid prototyping
- Strict material standards — no substitution with inferior raw materials
- Trusted by mills running Ring frame, Airjet/Vortex, and Rotor/OE spinning systems
- Circular supply chain: used products bought back and recycled
